journal.name: Washington University Journal of Law & Policy
aliases: Washington University Journal of Law and Policy

registry_refs.key: Washington University Journal of Law and Policy
registry_refs.notes: Registry rank 102; legacy host is mapped as Digital Commons.

publication_scope.notes: The complete visible archive remains under openscholarship.wustl.edu/law_journal_law_policy/, whose issue records hand off to Janeway article pages under /lawpolicy/.

evidence.notes: Publication HTML is permitted; /do/ and account/submission routes are disallowed.
Unpaginated legacy archive visibly lists volumes 1 through 66, ending in 2021.
Thirteen div.doc records expose title, author, a legacy landing URL, and a Link to a Janeway article ID.
Middle-volume issue uses the same Digital Commons issue-list structure.
Oldest-volume issue remains reachable in the same archive family.
User-agent * is allowed across the host.
Janeway page exposes DC.Description and citation_* meta tags for title, author, affiliation, publication date, volume, issue, journal, ISSN, keywords, and PDF URL.
Single bounded smoke returned PDF magic bytes and 415,214 bytes; server ignored the Range header and delivered the complete article PDF.

reconnaissance.notes: Bounded reconnaissance found a two-host migration path: Digital Commons archive and issue enumeration, then Janeway article metadata and files. Only one Janeway article page was sampled.

include: Legacy issue and article records under /law_journal_law_policy/
Janeway article pages and PDFs under /lawpolicy/
scope.notes: Require either the legacy publication slug or the Janeway /lawpolicy/ prefix; never broaden to the shared hosts.

edges.notes: Issue path encodes volume and issue; heading text contains year.
The first Link in each migrated record is the Janeway target; retain the legacy title and author from the same div.doc.
Read the meta content attribute first; visible Download pdf links provide a galley URL fallback.

archive_patterns.notes: Canonical citation_pdf_url; galley URLs also appear in page links.

layout_eras.label: Digital Commons legacy archive and issues
layout_eras.notes: Issue structure is stable across sampled volumes; displayed years begin with the predecessor-era volume 1.

layout_eras.label: Janeway article and file delivery
layout_eras.notes: Only one migrated article was sampled, so temporal coverage is not yet established.

sources.example: Judges for British Subjects in Spanish East Florida
sources.notes: Legacy issue link text is a fallback.

title.missingness: Present in the sampled issue records and article page.

authors.missingness: Present on the sampled article; front matter may lack authors.

sources.example: In 1784, the sovereignty of St. Augustine and East Florida was transferred to Spain.

abstract.missingness: Present on the one sampled Janeway article.

year.missingness: Present on the sampled page; archive headings supply a fallback.

volume.missingness: Encoded in issue URLs and sampled metadata.

issue.missingness: Encoded in issue URLs and sampled metadata.

pages.missingness: Not established in the bounded sample.

citation.missingness: Not established in the bounded sample.

patterns.notes: Single smoke returned a complete article PDF; Range was ignored.

validation.notes: PDF began %PDF-1.7; filename lawpolicy-1814-mirow.pdf and article-specific metadata identify article granularity.

robots.notes: Use publication HTML only; /do/ is disallowed.

barriers.notes: Legacy /do/ endpoints cannot be used; the all-issues route avoids them.

access.politeness_notes: Robots were checked on both hosts before journal pages. Reconnaissance was publication-scoped and downloaded only one small smoke PDF.

verdict.summary: The journal is enumerable through a stable Digital Commons all-issues archive, but current article metadata and PDFs live on a Janeway host; the representative Janeway PDF smoke passed.
blockers: Only one Janeway article page was sampled.
Existing DigitalCommonsIssueArticleHopAdapter does not yet document the cross-host Janeway handoff.
verdict.next_action: Add a publication-scoped Janeway handoff to the mapped Digital Commons adapter, then smoke three article pages across eras without using /do/.
verdict.implementation_notes: Enumerate /law_journal_law_policy/all_issues.html, retain title/author/year/volume/issue from legacy issue records, follow only /lawpolicy/article/id/ links, and prefer citation_* meta tags plus citation_pdf_url.
